resources.string: Offhand runs a large AI model directly on your phone, so nothing you record ever leaves the device. This device does not meet the minimum requirements.
Everything you record stays on this phone. Recordings, transcripts, and notes are encrypted on this device, and the AI that processes them runs right here — nothing is ever uploaded.

Your notes are encrypted with a key stored in this phone\'s secure hardware. This phone has no screen lock, so anyone who picks it up can open Offhand. Set up a PIN, pattern, or fingerprint to keep your notes private.
Offhand transcribes and summarizes voice notes with AI that runs entirely on your phone. To get started, it needs a one-time download of its AI models.
The download continues in the background — you can start recording right away. We\'ll notify you when everything is ready.
Tip: connect to Wi‑Fi to save mobile data.
Offhand is setting up on-device AI
Transcription and summaries now run fully on this device.
Check your connection. Offhand will resume the download when you record your next note.

Share anonymous crash and performance reports so we can keep the app reliable. This never includes your notes, recordings, transcripts, or any personal data — everything you record stays on this device. You can change this anytime in Settings.
